series_metadata.series_title: Child Care Licensing, Type B Home and Step Up To Quality Files
series_metadata.series_description: Records include receipted license application forms, licensees'' compliance statement and related documentation which serves as evidence of compliance with statutory requirements, reports of facility inspections by building, fire and health departments, inspection reports and related investigatory summaries of the centers. Files may also include copies of medical statements, material mandated documents of administrative hearings and Common Pleas Court proceedings, alleged operations, daycamps and additional license documentation. Step Up To Quality records may contain application, Star Rating Certificate, Onsite Inspections and visits, correction action and compliance, deferral and correspondence documents, appeals, supporting documents and additional license documentation. Type B Home License reports may contain electronic and paper Type B Home applications and county recommendations for licensure, annual inspection documents including but not limited to: home inspections, records reviews, and background check reviews, corrective action plans, complaints, appeals and revocation

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 60 days hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete ; Electronic: in office Open centers files: 1. 5 documents shall be kept life of licensed program; A. Initial application material; B. Permits; and C. License Amendments E. Enforcements documents. 2. other types of documents shall be purged 5 years scanned date. Closed center files: from date of center closure
